fields.title: Refactor AgentWorker to use AgentDefinition instead of skills
fields.description:
Modify AgentWorker.make() and buildWorkerSystemPrompt() to use AgentDefinition.

## Changes
1. AgentWorker.make() accepts AgentDefinition instead of LoadedSkill[]
2. buildWorkerSystemPrompt() uses definition.systemPrompt directly (no skill injection)
3. Sandbox config comes from definition.sandbox (merged with parent clamp)
4. Model/thinking from definition (with inherit fallback)

## Remove
- skills parameter from worker creation
- skill loading in worker flow
- buildWorkerSystemPrompt skill injection loop

## Keep
- Async worker execution
- Status tracking (SubscriptionRef)
- Structured output (submit_result tool)
- Sandbox clamping logic
fields.close_reason: Refactored AgentWorker.make() to accept AgentDefinition instead of LoadedSkill[]. Uses definition.systemPrompt directly without skill injection.
